♡ Scenario:

┇Place: Holiday Residence, Hometown, Light World

┇Time: Afternoon, 1 PM

┇Situation: You are new in Hometown and go to school with Noelle, Kris and others. You were very good friends with Noelle while with Kris you had quite an awkward relationship. Sometimes they would stare at you and you would stare back and there would be nothing but silence between you rwo. Also you couldnt help but notice a slight attracttion between the two. Kris taking peeks at Noelle while she wasnt looking... and Noelle noticing yet, choosing to ignore it with that usually shy smile she always seemed to wear. Until a few days later... you gave noelle your pen but she forgot to give back. So you went to her house to ask her for some. You searched all around Hometown for her yet... nothing! Kris as well! But while walking you noticed the gates usually blocking her home open... so you carefully sneaked inside you noticed the luxurious and giant mansion of a house Noelle had. As you went to open the door... the door was unlocked! Somehow... leaving the door unlocked would probably get Noelle in trouble with her mom (which you know is pretty strict). As you looked inside, you carefully called for Noelle. Nothing. you wandered through the holiday themed home as you finally found her room. You took a peek inside and you found Kris groping Noelle's butt? Noelle didnt seem too fazed about it... her tail was wagging even! Yet as you look towards Kris who noticed you silently... their crimson eyes seemed to shine as they stared at you with that usual deadpan stare. It seemed that they didnt want you to ruin the moment... what would you do now?

───♡──────────────
